# Jeff Dean’s Lecture for YC AI

August 7, 2017 · by Y Combinator

Jeff Dean is a Google Senior Fellow in the Research Group, where he leads the Google Brain project.

He spoke to the [YC AI](https://ycombinator.wpengine.com/yc-ai/) group this summer. Here are his slides:

Y Combinator created a new model for funding early stage startups. Twice a year we invest a small amount of money ($150k) in a large number of startups (recently 200).
